title: Citrusy Greek Yogurt Ceviche
description: This refreshing citrusy Greek yogurt ceviche features white vinegar and fluffs up with a whisk to create a unique low-sodium-friendly dish perfect for sick-day meals.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice or lime juice (about 2 lemons/limes)
1/8 teaspoon fine sea salt or equivalent amount of pink Himalayan salt
2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh dill (like parsley)

instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the Greek yogurt, lemon or lime juice, salt, orange zest, garlic, pepper, and dill.
Gently whisk the mixture to blend it together without overmixing. Add the freshly squeezed orange juice and mix again gently.
Fold in the chopped fresh dill with a spatula for a fluffy texture.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving, shaking gently every 15 minutes to ensure even distribution of flavors.
